{{Quote|Aunt Rouge, Aunt Celly, and Aunt Tia... Father's sisters. They never stopped trying to turn me into what they called a Proper Princess—and marry me off to some brainless twerp from one of the other ancient ruling Houses...|Leia Organa|<ref name="CotJ" />}}
'''Tia Organa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a member of the [[House of Organa/Legends|Organa family]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and the sister of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail]], [[Celly Organa/Legends|Celly]], and [[Rouge Organa]], and the adopted aunt of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

==Biography==
A member of House Organa, Tia Organa grew up on Alderaan with her brother and sisters. Several years before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, Organa was set to marry a nobleman of [[House Vandron]]. Despite this, Organa had begun having an affair with her brother [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Prestor Organa's]] friend and companion, [[Halagad Ventor]]. During the affair, Organa joined her brother and Ventor on a [[Manka cat/Legends|manka cat]] hunting expedition at the [[Okonomo Retreat]] when the mad geneticist [[Zeta Magnus]] infiltrated the Retreat building and infected all of the revelers, including Ventor's parents, with a [[hive virus]]. Driven mad by the virus, the partygoers were held under a cannibalistic sway and began a mad frenzy of devouring each other before ultimately being consumed by Magnus. When the hunting party received word of the [[Okonomo Tragedy|tragedy]], Ventor abandoned Organa and left her pregnant and alone. The scandal rocked the political world in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]] City, and the alliance between House Organa and House Vandron came to an end. She later gave birth to a son, whom she named [[Nial Organa]].<ref name="SkyeWalkers" />

Organa had a number of [[pittin]]s whom she spoiled, treating them like they were her own children. They included [[All-Terrain Attack Vehicle]], [[Taffy]], [[Winkie]], and [[Fluffy (pittin)|Fluffy]].

Tia Organa was present on Alderaan in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] when [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] ordered the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. When the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] fired on Alderaan and destroyed it within seconds, Organa perished along with her son and all other Alderaanians present on the world.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wiktionary:t%C3%ADa#Spanish|''Tía'']] is the real-world Spanish word for ''aunt''.
